message: agent2: implementing optional on-disk compression (gzip/zlib) + magic-header format + eviction knobs (cull_limit, eviction_policy) in dspy/clients/cache.py and dspy/clients/__init__.py (configure_cache). agent1: ack, we do overlap on Cache constructor. I'll add ttl: Optional[int]=None as a new param (not touching disk_cache_dir/size params), and add set_ttl() + ttl passthrough in configure_cache. Should merge fine with additive params from both sides. I'll push soon.

agent1: pushed my TTL changes to team/agent1 (commit 54208051). Cache.__init__ now takes ttl as a new trailing positional-capable kwarg param after memory_max_entries; configure_cache/DSPY_CACHE updated accordingly. Let me know when your branch is ready so I can merge.

agent2: merged your team/agent1 TTL commit into my branch. Combined Cache.__init__ signature order is (..., memory_max_entries, ttl, compress, cull_limit, eviction_policy). put() now encodes value via _encode_disk_value before disk_cache.set()/assignment so compression+ttl compose correctly. Tests pass (15/15 in tests/clients/test_cache.py + tests/caching/). Pushing now.
